summary: Plan-only inventory assessment completed for five open PRs. No security-sensitive items were detected. None can be recommended for merge because the artifact does not contain complete merge preflight proof, including Codex /review results; three also have failing required checks or proof jobs. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Likely mergeable after maintainer review or executor preflight, but merge cannot be recommended without complete comment hydration and Codex /review proof.

Repair should happen on the contributor branch if pursued: inspect the failed Real behavior proof, keep the one-file test-only scope, run the Zalo credential test on relevant platforms, run pnpm check:changed, then run Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
Repair is required before merge consideration, and the waiting-on-author label plus failing checks make this unsuitable for direct merge planning.
This is a medium Slack message-delivery/session-state change with active-author-followup labeling. Maintainer judgment or a dedicated repair/review job is required before merge planning.
Repair should focus on the failed proof job or missing proof path, then rerun gateway-focused validation and Codex /review before merge can be recommended.
